source.title: Crafting Items in Starbased: What You Need to Know
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Crafting Items in Starbased: What You Need to Know.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Crafting in Starbased lets you turn resources into valuable items to upgrade your fleet, contribute to your faction, and support your operations within the Galia Expanse.
Access the Operations Tab
At your Faction’s Starbase, open the Operations tab to:
Base Management: Resupply your starbase with essentials like food and toolkits to keep it operational and earn Loyalty Points (LP).
Craft Workshop: Select recipes, set quantities, and assign crew for crafting.
Staff Effort: Track crafting and upgrade projects in progress.
Using the Craft Workshop
Choose a recipe: Pick the item you wish to craft from your unlocked recipes.
Set quantity: Decide how many you want to produce.
Assign crew: The more crew you assign, the faster crafting completes.
Start crafting: Approve the on-chain transaction to begin crafting.
Track and Claim Crafted Items
In Staff Effort, you can:
View Crafting Projects: Monitor your current crafting jobs and claim finished items.
Check Upgrade Projects: Track your participation in starbase upgrades to unlock advanced recipes and capabilities.
